changeSet.author: benedikt
changeSet.comment: Remove duplicate daily body_metrics rows (source_activity_id IS NULL); keep newest id per (user_id, metric_type, recorded_at)
changeSet.sql: DELETE bm FROM body_metrics bm INNER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, metric_type, recorded_at, MAX(id) AS keep_id FROM body_metrics WHERE source_activity_id IS NULL GROUP BY user_id, metric_type, recorded_at HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) dup ON bm.user_id = dup.user_id AND bm.metric_type = dup.metric_type AND bm.recorded_at = dup.recorded_at AND bm.source_activity_id IS NULL AND bm.id <> dup.keep_id;

changeSet.author: benedikt
changeSet.comment: Add stored generated column source_activity_id_norm = COALESCE(source_activity_id, 0) to enable a NULL-safe unique index

changeSet.author: benedikt
changeSet.comment: Unique index over (user_id, metric_type, recorded_at, source_activity_id_norm) – prevents duplicate daily body_metrics even when source_activity_id is NULL
